evals.description: Agent creates a new app on the Bagdock platform
evals.input: Create a new private edge adapter called 'xero-sync' on Bagdock
evals.expected_behavior: Creates an integration_adapter with slug 'xero-sync', type 'access_control', visibility 'private', review_status 'draft'

evals.description: Agent deploys a worker to staging
evals.expected_behavior: Uploads worker bundle with environment='staging', returns worker URL at {slug}.pre.bdok.dev

evals.description: Agent submits app for marketplace review
evals.input: Submit my adapter for marketplace review
What's the review status of my latest submission?
evals.expected_behavior: Returns submission history with version IDs, change reasons, and current_status

evals.input: Withdraw my submission, I need to fix a bug first
evals.expected_behavior: Sets review_status back to 'draft', creates withdrawal version record

evals.description: Agent creates an API key for CI deployment
evals.input: Create a secret API key named 'CI Deploy' for the live environment
evals.expected_behavior: Returns new key with sk_live_ prefix, shown once

evals.description: Agent lists environment variables for an app
evals.input: Show me the env vars for xero-sync
evals.expected_behavior: Returns list of env var keys with updated timestamps

evals.input: Set XERO_CLIENT_ID to abc123 on my adapter
evals.expected_behavior: Stores env var (value masked), takes effect on next deploy
